untranslatable_reason: This signal requires detection of external news events and fundamental thesis invalidation, neither of which can be expressed using price/volume technical indicators. The rule is fundamentally discretionary and event-driven rather than rule-based. Key missing capability: news event detection, thesis monitoring, and semantic market interpretation. The 30-minute exit window and price reversal logic cannot be reliably operationalized without explicit news timestamps and fundamental data feeds.
translation_notes: SCHWAGER_DRY_0_1 is a discretionary risk management principle rather than a mechanical trading rule. It requires: (1) explicit news event timestamps, (2) pre-event thesis documentation, (3) semantic analysis of news materiality, and (4) fundamental valuation inputs. The only mechanizable component would be elevated volume post-announcement, but this alone cannot capture the signal's intent. Recommend implementing as a manual override or with external news API integration rather than as a pure technical backtest rule.
